title: Home
content: Welcome to Shiloh Baptist Church, Biloxi Mississippi. Join us Sundays at 10:30 AM.

title: About Us
content: Shiloh Baptist Church was founded in 1986 in Biloxi, Mississippi. We are a community of faith, family, and service.

title: Our History
content: Since 1986, Shiloh Baptist Church has served the Biloxi community through worship, outreach, and discipleship.

title: Pastoral Staff
content: Meet our pastor and staff who serve Shiloh Baptist Church.

title: Beliefs
content: We hold to the historic Baptist faith: salvation by grace through faith, the authority of Scripture, and the priesthood of all believers.

title: Ministries
content: Shiloh Baptist Church offers ministries for every stage of life and every area of service.

title: Music Ministry
content: The Shiloh Baptist Choir ministers in song every Sunday. Director: Renee Chavis.

title: Men's Fellowship
content: Monthly men's Bible study and prayer breakfast, held the first Saturday of each month.

title: Women's Ministry
content: The Women's Ministry meets monthly for fellowship, Bible study, and community service.

title: Youth Ministry
content: Programs for children and teens ages 6-18, including Sunday school, summer camp, and mentoring.

title: Events
content: Stay up to date with upcoming events at Shiloh Baptist Church.

title: 40th Anniversary
content: Join us October 11, 2026 as we celebrate 40 years of faith, family, and service at Shiloh Baptist Church, Biloxi.

title: Building Committee
content: The Building Committee oversees all facilities, maintenance, and construction projects for the church. Chair: John Baker.

title: Contact Us
content: Shiloh Baptist Church | 3201 Mississippi Ave, Biloxi, MS 39532 | Phone: (228) 555-0400 | Email: info@shilohbaptistbiloxi.org

title: Give Online
content: Support the ministry of Shiloh Baptist Church through our secure online giving portal powered by Donorbox.

title: Prayer Requests
content: Submit your prayer requests and our prayer team will lift you up. All requests are kept confidential.

title: Sermons
content: Listen to or read recent sermons from Pastor James Wilkins and guest preachers.

title: Outreach
content: Shiloh Baptist Church is committed to serving the Biloxi community through food pantry drives, clothing donations, and neighborhood events.

title: Privacy Policy
content: This website collects minimal information. We do not sell or share your personal information.

title: Volunteer
content: There are many ways to serve at Shiloh Baptist Church. Browse open volunteer opportunities and sign up online.

title: Anniversary Registration
content: Register for the 40th Anniversary Celebration on October 11, 2026. Registration is free but space is limited for the founders brunch.
